title: Kraken launches crypto debit card in UK and Europe
snippet: Kraken has introduced a Mastercard debit card in the UK and Europe that lets users spend hundreds of crypto and cash currencies.

title: Hyundai completes USDT treasury settlement pilot between US and Mexico
snippet: Hyundai completed a proof-of-concept using Tether's USDT to settle a cross-border treasury transfer between its US and Mexican subsidiaries, highlighting growing enterprise interest in stablecoin-based payments.

title: Robinhood Chain draws over $3 billion in weekly DEX volume to join top five chains: Bernstein
snippet: Robinhood Chain hit $3.1B in weekly DEX volume and 65K users since its July 1 launch, as the Layer 2 eyes tokenized markets, Bernstein said.

title: Japan stablecoin payments advance with Lawson trial, Netstars launch
snippet: Lawson will test yen stablecoin payments in Tokyo as Netstars launches a merchant service supporting USDC, USDT and JPYC.

title: UK lays out tokenized finance roadmap with projected £33 billion annual boost
snippet: Industry leaders say payment infrastructure must evolve alongside tokenized assets to enable real-time settlement.

title: Japan’s largest security token platform moves nearly $3 billion to Avalanche blockchain
snippet: Progmat develops security token infrastructure that accounts for 64.6% of Japan’s security token market total issuance value.

Japan’s SBI to launch yen stablecoin lending with 3% yield
snippet: SBI VC Trade will open JPYSC lending applications on July 16, offering an initial 3% annual rate for a 12-week term without deposit insurance.

title: Japan’s SBI Group to launch JPYSC stablecoin lending service this month
snippet: The SBI's service would offer users a 3% annual yield for deposited JPYSC stablecoins, according to Nikkei.

title: Bank of Thailand Flags Abnormal Stablecoin Trades in 'Grey Economy' Crackdown
snippet: Data analytics flagged stablecoin transfers meant to evade scrutiny, the central bank says, handing the findings to the securities regulator.

title: Bank of Thailand audits high-volume stablecoin trades to crack down on illicit finance: report
snippet: The central bank and the SEC have reportedly begun using data analytics tools to examine abnormal stablecoin trades, with a focus on USDT.

snippet: South American nation Bolivia is considering the use of the largest dollar-backed stablecoin, USDT, per a local report.

title: Stablecoin FX priced below interbank rates in Q2, with routing now the biggest cost lever: Borderless
snippet: Stablecoin payments were priced 3.2 bps below interbank FX rates across 260 corridors in Q2, per Borderless.xyz's benchmark.

title: Bank of Thailand targets USDT and cash flows in gray money crackdown
snippet: Thailand has been plagued by Chinese-affiliated scam centers, with illicit gains flowing through a “gray money” economy.

title: Onchain Pokémon cards come to Solana-based DEX Jupiter
snippet: While tokenized Pokémon cards aren’t new, having Jupiter enter the space could give the whole category a legitimacy boost.

title: UK tokenization push could add as much as $44B to annual output by 2035: Report
snippet: The government-backed roadmap calls for the UK’s first digital gilt by early 2027 and seeks to make tokenized bonds usable for trading and borrowing.

title: AI microbusinesses could drive $262B in stablecoin volume by 2033: Swyftx
snippet: The AI-native cohort of the expanding gig economy could increasingly use stablecoins to avoid slow and expensive traditional payment rails, Australian crypto exchange Swyftx said.
